results.content:
## API REST completa para plataformas SaaS

Diseñado específicamente para empresas SaaS para integrar firmas electrónicas sin problemas. Administra equipos ilimitados, personaliza la experiencia con marca blanca y escala sin esfuerzo.

1. Plantillas
2. Documentos
3. Equipos
4. Eventos

1. OBTENER
2. ### Flujo de Eventos

Accede a eventos en tiempo real para todas las actividades del equipo y cambios de estado de documentos.

1. Eventos del ciclo de vida del documento
2. Notificaciones de progreso de firma
3. Monitoreo de actividades del equipo
4. Errores y alertas del sistema

1. VER
2. ### Plantillas de Lista

Eventos enviados por el servidor para notificaciones en tiempo real en tu aplicación SaaS. [...] Diseñado para SaaS, eliminamos la complejidad y los contratos. Obtienes una integración sencilla de API y cumplimiento por solo 0,029 € por sobre, hasta 10 veces más barato que los proveedores tradicionales.

¿Qué tan fácil es integrar Firma.dev en mi aplicación?

Extremadamente fácil. Con nuestra API REST orientada a desarrolladores y documentación clara, la mayoría de los equipos se integran en menos de una hora. Puedes comenzar a probar gratis inmediatamente.

¿Es Firma.dev seguro y conforme?

Sí. Utilizamos cifrado de grado bancario y cumplimos completamente con ESIGN, UETA y GDPR. Tus datos están encriptados en tránsito y en reposo, asegurando plena aplicabilidad legal.

¿Necesito firmar un contrato o comprometerme a un plan mensual? [...] Sin contratos, nunca. Firma es estrictamente de pago por uso. Solo pagas por los sobres que envías, sin mínimos mensuales ni tarifas ocultas.

Vale, estoy dentro. ¿Cómo empiezo?

Simple. Crea tu cuenta aquí, y generaremos tu clave API.

Preguntas frecuentes

## Preguntas frecuentes

Para cualquier pregunta sin respuesta, comuníquese con nuestro equipo de soporte por correo electrónico. Responderemos lo antes posible para ayudarle.

¿Qué hace que Firma.dev sea diferente de otros proveedores de firmas electrónicas?

Diseñado para SaaS, eliminamos la complejidad y los contratos. Obtienes una integración sencilla de API y cumplimiento por solo 0,029 € por sobre, hasta 10 veces más barato que los proveedores tradicionales.

¿Qué tan fácil es integrar Firma.dev en mi aplicación?

results.title: Enterprise-Grade E-Signature Security | Firma.dev Security
results.content:
#### eIDAS SES and AdES (European Union)

Firma.dev supports Simple Electronic Signatures and Advanced Electronic Signatures with tamper-evident audit trails and signer identification.

#### UK eIDAS (United Kingdom)

Electronic signatures remain valid under retained EU law.

### Data protection

Signer consent is captured and recorded before any signature is applied.

#### GDPR (European Union)

All data is stored in the EU. Firma.dev acts as a data processor on your behalf. A Data Processing Agreement is available for all customers. We assist with Data Subject requests as required.

#### HIPAA (United States)

Firma.dev runs on HIPAA-compliant AWS infrastructure, making it suitable for healthcare-related documents. If you require a Business Associate Agreement, contact support. [...] A grid of regulatory terms on a dark background includes HIPAA, GDPR, UETA, and others in various colors. SOC 2 in a purple rectangle stands out.

### Security standards

Firma.dev is designed with SOC 2 principles in mind. SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications are on our roadmap.

### Long-Term Signature Validation (PAdES B-LTA)

Every signed document includes a PAdES B-LTA signature profile. This means signatures are tamper-proof and fully self-validating for 30+ years, with no dependency on external certificate authorities or online validation services after signing.

All required validation data (certificates, revocation information, and timestamps) is embedded directly in the PDF at signing time. [...] Full Color Firma logo with purple, cyan, and yellow

# Firma.dev E-signature API

Only €0.029 per envelope (or about 3 cents USD), no minimums, no contracts. Made for SaaS to embed multi-team signature flows fast.

## ​ What is Firma?

Firma provides hosted signing flows and an embeddable template editor so you can add document signing to your product with minimal build effort. You can: [...] Create siloed, secure workspaces for each of your customers so their data stays separated.
 Embed a template editor so users can design documents from inside your app.
 Embed the signing experience so signers can sign without leaving your interface.
 Use workflows to enable native functionality within your app, so that you have a fully white-labeled e-signature experience.

### ​ Getting Started with Firma

 Sign up for free — no credit card required
 Get your API key
 Explore guides in this documentation to embed editors and automate sending e-signatures.
 Explore guides in this documentation to build e-signature flows in your app.
 Support tickets can be opened from your dashboard.

results.title: Firma.dev: Electronic signature api at just $0.029 for developers
results.content:
Launched on November 28th, 2025

2

3

Lightfield

What do you think? …

Derick Dorner
Firma.dev

Firma.dev

Hey Product Hunt, Derick here, co-founder of Firma.dev.

We built Firma.dev because every e-signature API we tried was either priced for enterprises or was an end-user app with an API bolted on as an afterthought. We wanted the opposite: an API-first product where signing is something you integrate in an afternoon, not a procurement cycle.

💸 Pricing. €0.029 per envelope, about 3¢, pay-as-you-go with no minimums or contracts. DocuSign can run $4-5 for a single envelope, so for most teams that's around 99% less. [...] 🤖 Built for AI-assisted development. We ship two MCP servers, one for our docs and one for the API itself with 84 tools, so coding agents generate accurate Firma.dev integration code and can even manage signing requests directly. We have a guide for Claude Code, plus Antigravity, Cursor, Lovable and the rest in our docs.

🌍 Legality. Designed to support the frameworks that matter, and e-signatures are legally recognized in 55+ countries.

🔑 Try it free. There's a sandbox key with real documents and unlimited usage, so you can test the whole flow before paying anything. No demos, no sales calls.

We'd love your feedback, especially from anyone who's fought with e-signature integrations before. I'll be around all day to answer questions.

Derick [...] Firma.dev

results.content:
## Why teams choose Firma.dev

 Costs that make sense. Pay €0.029 per envelope. First 25 are free so you can test end to end before paying.
 Clean separation by customer. Workspaces keep data, templates, and usage private per customer with no cross‑workspace exposure.
 Security and trust. Firma.dev is designed to align with ESIGN and UETA in the U.S., eIDAS SES and AdES in the EU and UK, GDPR for data protection, and HIPAA contexts in healthcare.

## Your checklist

 Pick the first document to automate
 Invite engineering with the note above
 Create your first Customer Workspace
 Confirm webhooks are on so your system knows when a document is signed

That is it. Once the first signing request goes out, your team can refine the flow and add more templates. [...] Full Color Firma logo with purple, cyan, and yellow

# Non‑technical guide: Get e‑signatures live in your product today

## Who this is for

You own the rollout or the business outcome. You do not plan to write code. You want your team to start sending real documents for signature inside your product.

## What success looks like today

Two quick wins:

1. Invite your engineering team so they can plug Firma.dev into your app.
2. Create your first Customer Workspace so each customer’s documents and usage stay separate. [...] Create a reusable Template either with the embedded visual editor or via API.
 Send a Signing Request (see docs) based on that template.
 Deliver the signing view inside your product or redirect to a hosted page.
 Turn on Webhooks so your app reacts when a document is viewed, signed, or completed.

You do not need to manage any of that. Your role is to pick the first document and define what “done” means.

## Why teams choose Firma.dev
